cards.title: IPO & Capital Market Advisory
cards.description: Full cycle capital market access — SME and mainboard IPOs, DRHP, and listing support for companies at all stages.

cards.title: M&A Advisory
cards.description: Buy side, sell side, and cross-border transaction advisory for value-creating M&A partnerships.

cards.title: Valuation Services
cards.description: SEBI-registered valuations for promoter, advisory, ESOP, and fairness opinion mandates.

cards.title: Open Offer & Buyback
cards.description: Regulatory-compliant management of open offer, delisting, and share buyback mandates.
